name: Oatmeal Breakfast Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend together the margarine and brown sugar until creamy.
2. Beat in the egg whites until foamy, then stir in the molasses.
3. Stir in the milk until combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, bran flakes, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the quick-cooking oatmeal.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them to wire racks to cool completely.
These cookies are healthy enough to give for on-the-run breakfasts.
